title: Phase 2 Local Canvas Recommender Plan
summary: Revise Phase 2 per GRL-20260628-fullscreen-canvas-layout 14 locked decisions. Four vertical tasks: source-backed rule foundation, fullscreen pan/zoom canvas runtime shell (replacing M1 rendering layer), node popover + canvas branch navigation, and localStorage route persistence (20-cap FIFO). Hero-only top bar, detail-panel removed, evidence by right-click popover, viewport-clipped virtualized canvas.
approach: Rule foundation -> fullscreen pan/zoom canvas shell (Q1.1/Q1.2/Q1.3/Q3.2/Q3.3/Q4.3/Q5.1/Q3.1 gesture shell/Q4.1 M1 replace) -> node popover + branch navigation (Q2.1/Q2.2/Q2.3/Q3.1 popover/Q4.2 swimlane) -> route persistence (Q5.2). Strict serial waves; each task MUST satisfy deep work rules (read_first + grep-verifiable convergence + concrete action values).

confidence.pressure_pass: TASK-002 checked for UI-observable vertical slice coverage (fullscreen canvas + pan/zoom + fullscreen toggle + empty initial state).
